strategy_reasoning: Nucleophilic aromatic substitution at 150°C with moderate IF=2.8 suggests thermal activation with reasonable kinetics. No photochemistry or gas-liquid constraints allow full diameter range sampling.

problem_statement.flow_justification_note: High temperature (150°C) nucleophilic aromatic substitution benefits from precise temperature control and heat management that flow provides
